reviews.comment:
Es una de mis estaciones de servicio favoritas. Son muy amables, tienen baños limpios y el shop tiene excelentes tentempies. Ademas el lugar de descanso bajo los árboles es grande y con mesas.
Lo lamentable es que si vas para el oeste por la ruta 8 tenés que dar una vuelta larga porque quedó del otro lado de la autopista.

(Translated by Google)
It's one of my favorite gas stations. The staff is very friendly, the restrooms are clean, and the convenience store has excellent snacks. Plus, the rest area under the trees is spacious and has tables.
The only downside is that if you're heading west on Route 8, you have to take a long detour because it's on the other side of the highway.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1OUszeU5BEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Nice inn, clean, but please, the toilet flushing system (plugs) in the women's restroom needs to be repaired. Thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPNjcyNVRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio a la salida arrecifes. A la orilla de la ruta. Muy linda. Baños super limpios. Tiene un shopp chico pero con muchas opciones.  Lo bueno que tienen variedad de menú. Hamburguesas, milanesa, tartas.  La atención re bien y super amable. La recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
Gas station on the outskirts of Arrecifes. Right on the side of the road. Very nice. Super clean restrooms. It has a small shop but with lots of options. The best part is they have a varied menu. Hamburgers, breaded cutlets, pies. The service is excellent and super friendly. I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPOF82bUJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención tanto de los playeros cómo adentro por las empleadas.
Buen servicio y tener en cuenta que se puede pasar un lindo día en su predio si SOS socio,con mesas,parrilla,arboleda,muy bien cuidado y buena iluminación.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from both the beach attendants and the staff inside. Great service, and keep in mind that you can have a lovely day on their grounds if you're a member, with tables, a grill, trees, very well maintained and good lighting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPdGUtcW9RRRAB
